recalls.Description: Siemens Industry is recalling SolarReady Meter Combos identified by catalog numbers MC2442S1200SC and MC2442S1200FC, produced between August 2021 and August 2022. These units connect utility power, rooftop solar systems, and home electrical panels. Depending on the setup, they may house the branch circuits for the entire home or just part of it, along with the main service disconnect for the home's power supply.
recalls.Title: Siemens Industry Issues Recall for SolarReady™ Meter Combos Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Siemens Industry at 800-756-6996 from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at psn.industry@siemens.com, or visit https://www.siemens.com/us/en/products/energy/low-voltage/solarready-meter-combo-safety-recall.html for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Siemens SolarReady Meter Combo and inside panel label
Location of Catalog Number and Date Stamp

Injuries.Name: The firm has received eight reports of overheating, including one report of a localized fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available through electrical distributors across the country from August 2021 to April 2024, priced between $640 and $990 based on the model.

Importers.Name: Siemens Industry Inc., of Alpharetta, Georgia

Hazards.Name: Overheating interior connections posing a fire risk

Remedies.Name: Contact Siemens for inspection and free repair or replacement by a licensed contractor if your SolarReady Meter Combo is affected.

recalls.metaDescription: Siemens recalls SolarReady Meter Combos due to fire hazards. Contact Siemens for inspection and free repairs.
